name: GALMED PHARMACEUT.IS -,01
summary: GALMED PHARMACEUT.IS -,01 is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for liver diseases and metabolic disorders. Its lead product candidate is Aramchol, a liver-targeted SCD1 modulator being developed for non-alcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH). The company is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.
